title: Manage home address
description: An employee's home address is used to calculate their taxes and determine eligibility for certain benefits. Make sure to keep it up-to-date.
changePendingDescription: {{possessiveLabel}} home address will change to {{newAddress}} on {{effectiveDate}}.
historyEmptyDescription: Once this employee has had more than one home address, their previous addresses will appear in this list.
editModalDescription: Update this employee's current home address. This information is used for payroll, benefits, and HR, so please make sure it's accurate.
createModalDescription: Enter the new address and when it takes effect. This information is used for payroll, benefits, and HR, so please make sure it's accurate.
startDateHelper: The date the employee started living at this address.
